MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-13-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS IS GRANTED PER DECLARATION OF C. BADROOS FILED FEB. 5, 2020. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling,

PETITIONER PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights is granted per declaration of C. Badroos filed Feb. 5, 2020. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Order signed after hearing.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
